usage: select_bump [-help] [-alternate {row column}] [-area {{x1 y1 x2 y2} ...}] [-assigned] [-bump_cell {cell_list}] [-bumps {bump_list}] [-floating] [-max_distance_to_side <distance>] [-nets {net_list}] [-side {top bottom left right}] [-start_lower_left] [-type {signal power ground}]

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies areas in which bumps are selected

options.name: -bump_cell
options.description: Specifies names of bump cells and bumps with these bump cells will be selected

options.name: -bumps
options.description: Specified names of bumps to be selected

options.name: -floating
options.description: Only selects unassigned or floating bumps

options.name: -max_distance_to_side
options.description: Specifies the maximum distance away from the side

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies names of nets and the related bump will be selected

options.name: -side
options.description: Specifies the side in which bump are selected

options.name: -start_lower_left
options.description: Specifies the start point of alternate selection

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies the type of bumps to be selected
